item.title: The Golden Rule in Christian Dating
item.description: The significance society puts on outside appearances just fortifies the strain to show bogus certainty. This is simply increased with the fame of unscripted tv and web-based media. It has become the standard for our general public to seem one approach to every other person, as opposed to zeroing in on rolling out the improvements inside that will permit us to adjust our feeling of self... Feed: https://feeds.libsyn.com/585395/rss

item.title: The Code of Honor: Paul J. Maurer and Ed Skoudis explore ethics in cybersecurity with Ben Yelin. [Special Edition]
item.description: Authors Paul J. Maurer and Ed Skoudis join Caveat podcast co host Ben Yelin to discuss their new book: "The Code of Honor: Embracing Ethics in Cybersecurity." The book is a comprehensive and practical framework for ethical practices in contemporary cybersecurity. Listen to Ben's discussion with Paul and Ed as they explore the ethical dimensions of cybersecurity, the influence of AI, and the responsibilities of cyber professionals... Feed: https://feeds.megaphone.fm/cyberwire-daily-podcast
